issues.description: Trigger 'Trigger' is invalid; should be 'OnPlay' for a Main card effect
SearchDeck action is incomplete; missing filter for card type 'Baroque Works' and exclusion of '[Disappointed?]'; missing trash action for remaining cards
Filter must specify type='Baroque Works' and exclude name='[Disappointed?]'; 'Any' is too broad and ignores the 3-card deck look constraint
Missing secondary action to trash remaining cards after search; the effect requires both a conditional search/add and mandatory trash of non-selected cards
